steps.title: Find the exponent change
steps.content:
When $x$ increases by $6$, the exponent $\frac{x}{3}$ increases by
$$\frac{6}{3}=2$$

steps.title: Convert the growth factor
steps.content:
The function is multiplied by the base squared.
$$(1.20)^2=1.44$$
A factor of $1.44$ means an increase of $44\%$. The answer is D.
